---
title: DHT Discovery Patterns
author: P2PExplorer
date: 2024-02-24
description: Distributed hash tables are the backbone of peer discovery
tags: ["#dht", "#discovery"]
---
Distributed hash tables are the backbone of peer discovery in P2P networks. Understanding Kademlia routing is essential for building robust systems.

**Core concepts:**
- XOR distance metric for routing
- K-buckets for peer management
- Iterative vs recursive lookups
